text: For me, history is more interesting than geography.
History is more interesting than geography.
A clear project is better than a long project.
Hi Carolina! Which subject is harder for you this year, math or science?
Math is much harder than science for me. But history is more interesting than both!
For me science is easier than history. Did you study for the science exam?
Yes! But the history project is bigger than the exam. It takes more time.
True. A clear project is better than a long one. Let us work on it together!
Great idea! Two people are better than one. The library is quieter than the cafeteria.
Which subject is harder for you?
My English grade is better than my math grade.

This year I have many different subjects at school, and they are not all the same. For me, history is more interesting than geography, because I love stories about the past. Science is harder than history, but it is also more exciting, because we do real experiments in the lab. Math is the most difficult subject for me. The exams are longer and the problems are more complicated than in other classes. English is easier than math, and it is my favorite subject of all. My teacher says I am better at writing than at numbers, and I think she is right. Next month we have a big science project about the ocean, and I am more nervous about that than about my history exam. School is busier this year, but it is also more fun than last year.

Good morning, students. I have a few important announcements about this week. First, the science exam is now on Thursday, not on Wednesday, so you have one more day to study. The exam is shorter than last time, only twenty questions, but the questions are more difficult, so please review your notes. Second, the history project is bigger this year. You will work in pairs and your presentation must be longer than ten minutes. Remember, a clear project is better than a long project, so keep your ideas simple. Finally, the library is now open later, until six o'clock, which is more convenient for everyone. If you need a quiet place to study, the library is calmer than the cafeteria. Good luck with your exams, and have a great week.

Carolina is comparing her school subjects. First, she says that history is more interesting than geography. Then, she explains that science is harder than history. After that, she says that math is the most difficult subject of all. Finally, she decides that English is easier than math and it is her favorite subject.
History is more interesting than geography.
The science project is bigger than the exam.
My English grade is better than my math grade.
Math is more difficult than geography.
Which subject is harder for you?
